body:
The regular expression used by ClimaAnalysis was not identifying correctly variables with an underscore in the short name. The reason for this was that the time interval capturing group was too greedy. I changed the capturing group to only match with `m|M|d|y|s|h`, allowing me to capture more general short names.

Closes #110
title: Correctly idenfity variables with `_` in the name

body:
closes #98, closes #107 

This PR adds functions for handling conversions from dates in the time dimension to seconds in the time dimension, shifting the dates to the first day of the month, and relax the conditions for `Var.arecompatible`.

Conversion from dates to seconds in the time dimension is handled automatically at the constructor level by the function `Var._dates_to_seconds`. Shifting to the first day of the month and adding any offset in multiple of months is done by `Var.shift_to_beginning_of_month`. Finally, the condtions for `Var.arecompatible are relaxed to just check for the units between dimensions instead of checking that the dimension attributes match exactly.
title: Add automatic conversion between dates in time dimension to seconds in time dimension and preprocessing for time dimension
